nl.en: How many delayed flights last week had compensation over $1,000?
nl.ko: 지난주 보상금이 $1,000을 초과한 지연 항공편은 몇 건입니까?
nl.ja: 先週、補償金が $1,000 を超えた遅延便は何件ですか?
nl.zh: 上周补偿金额超过 $1,000 的延误航班有多少?
nl.hi: पिछले हफ़्ते $1,000 से ज़्यादा compensation वाली कितनी flights में देरी हुई?

queries.kql:
delayed_flights
| where last_7_days(actual_arr)
| join compensation on flight_id
| where amount > 1000
| summarize count=count(), total=sum(amount), avg=avg(amount), top_route=top(1, route)

nl.en: Top 5 routes by delay last month
nl.ko: 지난달 지연 시간 기준 상위 5개 노선
nl.ja: 先月の遅延時間が最も多い上位 5 路線
nl.zh: 上月延误时长 Top 5 航线
nl.hi: पिछले महीने delay के हिसाब से Top 5 routes

queries.kql: flights | where last_30_days(actual_arr) | where delay_minutes > 15 | summarize count=count() by route | order by count desc | take 5

nl.en: Average compensation per airline this quarter
nl.ja: 今四半期、航空会社別の平均補償金
nl.zh: 本季度各航空公司的平均补偿金额
nl.hi: इस तिमाही में airline-वार average compensation

queries.kql: compensation | join airlines on airline_id | where quarter='2026Q2' | summarize avg=avg(amount) by airline_name | order by avg desc

nl.en: How many flights were delayed over 2 hours at JFK last week, and what's our DOT compensation exposure?
nl.ko: 지난주 JFK에서 2시간 이상 지연된 항공편은 몇 편이고, DOT 규정상 보상 노출은 얼마인가요?
nl.ja: 先週JFKで2時間以上遅延した便は何便で、DOT規制上の補償エクスポージャーはいくらですか?
nl.zh: 上周在 JFK 延误超过 2 小时的航班有多少,以及我们在 DOT 法规下的赔偿敞口是多少?
nl.hi: पिछले हफ़्ते JFK पर 2 घंटे से अधिक देरी से चलने वाली कितनी flights थीं, और DOT नियमों के तहत हमारा compensation exposure क्या है?

narrative.en: 18 flights delayed over 2 hours at JFK in the past 7 days (12 departure delays, 6 arrival delays), per the operational ontology. Under DOT 14 CFR Part 250 (Oversales) and DOT Aviation Consumer Protection guidance, airline-controllable delays exceeding 2 hours warrant meal/lodging/transport vouchers; involuntary denied boarding triggers $200–$1,550 cash compensation. Voucher exposure: ~$27,000 (18 flights × ~150 avg pax). Cash exposure depends on actual IDB events and controllability classification.
narrative.ko: 지난 7일간 JFK에서 2시간 이상 지연된 항공편은 총 18편이며 (출발 지연 12편, 도착 지연 6편), 운영 ontology의 Flight.flight_status='Delayed' 및 delay_minutes > 120 필터로 확인되었습니다. DOT 14 CFR Part 250 (Oversales) 및 DOT Aviation Consumer Protection 가이드에 따르면, 항공사가 통제 가능한 사유(정비, 승무 운영)로 인한 2시간 초과 지연 시 식사·숙박·교통 바우처 제공이 권고되며, IDB(involuntary denied boarding)가 발생한 경우 200~1,550 USD 범위의 cash compensation 의무가 발생합니다. 18편 × 평균 탑승객 수(약 150명) 기준 잠재 바우처 노출은 약 27,000 USD, IDB 발생 시 추가 cash 노출 가능. 정확한 노출액은 영향받은 승객 수 및 통제 가능성 분류에 따라 산정 필요.
narrative.ja: 過去7日間に JFK で2時間以上遅延した便は計18便 (出発遅延12便、到着遅延6便) で、運用 ontology の Flight.flight_status='Delayed' および delay_minutes > 120 フィルタで確認されました。DOT 14 CFR Part 250 (Oversales) および DOT Aviation Consumer Protection ガイドによると、航空会社の責に帰すべき事由 (整備、運航乗務) による2時間超の遅延では食事・宿泊・送迎バウチャー提供が推奨され、IDB (involuntary denied boarding) 発生時は 200~1,550 USD の cash compensation 義務が発生します。18便 × 平均搭乗客数 (約150名) 基準で voucher 換算の潜在エクスポージャーは約 27,000 USD、IDB 発生時は追加 cash 露出の可能性あり。正確な負担額は影響を受ける乗客数と controllability 分類により算出が必要です。
narrative.zh: 过去 7 天内在 JFK 延误超过 2 小时的航班共 18 班 (出发延误 12 班、到达延误 6 班),通过运营 ontology 的 Flight.flight_status='Delayed' 与 delay_minutes > 120 过滤确认。根据 DOT 14 CFR Part 250 (Oversales) 与 DOT Aviation Consumer Protection 指南,因航空公司可控原因 (维修、机组运营) 造成的 2 小时以上延误应提供餐饮·住宿·交通 voucher,IDB (involuntary denied boarding) 发生时则承担 200~1,550 USD 的 cash compensation 义务。按 18 班 × 平均旅客数 (约 150 人) 计算,voucher 换算的潜在敞口约 27,000 USD,IDB 发生时另有 cash 敞口。准确金额需依据受影响旅客数与可控性分类核算。
narrative.hi: पिछले 7 दिनों में JFK पर 2 घंटे से अधिक देरी वाली कुल 18 flights थीं (12 departure delays, 6 arrival delays), operational ontology के Flight.flight_status='Delayed' और delay_minutes > 120 filter से confirm हुआ। DOT 14 CFR Part 250 (Oversales) और DOT Aviation Consumer Protection guidance के अनुसार, airline-controllable कारणों (maintenance, crew operations) से 2 घंटे से अधिक delay पर meal·lodging·transport voucher देने की सिफ़ारिश है; IDB (involuntary denied boarding) पर $200–$1,550 cash compensation की obligation बनती है। 18 flights × औसत pax (~150) के हिसाब से potential voucher exposure ~$27,000, IDB होने पर additional cash exposure संभव। सटीक amount affected passenger count और controllability classification पर निर्भर करता है।

vpAnswer.source: Fabric IQ ontology + DOT regulation index · semantic JOIN · 4.7s

queries.kql:
delayed_flights
| where origin_airport == 'JFK'
| where last_7_days(actual_dep)
| where delay_minutes > 120
| summarize count=count(), dep_delays=countif(delay_type=='departure'), arr_delays=countif(delay_type=='arrival')

nl.ja: 整備イベントが最も多い機体
nl.hi: सबसे ज़्यादा maintenance events वाले aircraft

queries.kql: aircraft | join maintenance on aircraft_id | where quarter='2026Q2' | summarize events=count() by aircraft_id, model | order by events desc | take 3

nl.ja: すべての航空会社を一覧表示

vpAnswer.source: Fabric IQ ontology · live query · 1.9s · ⭐ first 5/7/2026 trace

queries.kql: airlines | project airline_id, name | order by name asc
